own_site_audit.status: no existing website — starting from scratch
own_site_audit.findings: No owned website. Strong social proof (39 5-star reviews). Ready for full-stack SEO build.

keyword_data.summary: DataForSEO research reveals PRIMARY keyword 'puppy for sale Singapore' (1,000 searches, KD: 15 LOW) is rankable for Curious Tails. Long-tail opportunities with VERY LOW difficulty (KD: 4-7) identified in adoption/free keywords. Breed-specific searches all MEDIUM competition but high volume. Educational keywords show trust/safety gap.

primary_keywords.serp_dominance: direct competitors (Wag a Tail, Dawgs & Co, The Lovely Pets, The Pup Life)
primary_keywords.notes: Top 10 includes 10+ direct competitors. Curious Tails must own price advantage and AVS trust angle.

breed_specific_keywords.gap: Curious Tails cheapest option with free training & kit
Significant price advantage + lifestyle-first matching (not just availability)

breed_specific_keywords.notes: Corgi NOT HDB-approved. Curious Tails opportunity: educate on breed fit before purchase
Not HDB-approved. Opportunity to educate on HDB-friendly alternatives

lifestyle_keywords.opportunity: Curious Tails' guided learning + starter kit directly answers this
Free AVS-certified lesson is major differentiator — own this
Free delivery + setup is unique value — content around transition
30+ item kit is major differentiator — create definitive guide

trust_keywords.opportunity: AVS registry verification — build educational hub on this
Educational trust content. Teach buyers how to verify AVS licenses.

weaknesses: no mention of home delivery setup

weaknesses: no clear value prop for first-time owners
pages_analysed.opportunity_for_ct: Curious Tails: Transparent pricing, AVS prominent, first-time owner focus, starter kit

weaknesses: pricing not on puppies (appears focused on subscription meals)
pages_analysed.opportunity_for_ct: Curious Tails: Clear puppy pricing, free delivery, free training, complete onboarding

serp_analysis.dominant_format: Product pages + breed guides + lifestyle blogs
serp_analysis.median_word_count_ranking_pages: 1500–2500 words for breed guides; 800–1200 for product pages
competitor_weaknesses: Thin onboarding guides — most assume buyer already knows what to buy
No home delivery/setup messaging — missed opportunity
No clear AVS trust angle — opportunity to educate
Limited content on breed-lifestyle matching — reactive, not proactive
No smuggling awareness content — educational gap
No clear training inclusion — unclear value add
information_gaps_identified: Comprehensive puppy starter kit guide (30+ items ranked by importance)
How to verify AVS licensing before buying (educational trust content)
Breed + lifestyle matching tool (first-time owner protection)
Cost of smuggled vs licensed puppies comparison (trust + fear appeal)
Free training lesson — what to expect and how it helps (value clarity)

verified_authority_sources.value: AVS-Accredited Certified Dog Trainers — link to free training lesson credibility
SPCA anti-smuggling campaign — cite when educating on unlicensed sellers
ICA smuggling data 2025 — stats for educational content
Real case study: smuggling risk and parvovirus deaths

topical_foundation.source_context: Curious Tails is an AVS-licensed, 2+ year established local breeder in Singapore offering puppies at $500–$2,000 cheaper than competitors, with free home delivery/setup, a 30+ item comprehensive starter kit, and a free first AVS-certified training lesson. The brand voice is warm, neighbourly, and generous — focused on honest breed matching and education over quick sales.
topical_foundation.central_entity: Licensed puppy sales + owner education + breed-lifestyle matching for Singapore families
topical_foundation.central_search_intent: First-time and repeat dog owners in Singapore seeking healthy, ethically-bred puppies with transparent pricing, trust signals, and post-purchase support
topical_foundation.root_document: Home page: 'Puppy for sale Singapore — licensed AVS breeder + free training + comprehensive starter kit' (targets PRIMARY_KEYWORD + PRIMARY_CITY + core value props)

factual_conflicts.resolution: Curious Tails at $2,888–$4,488 is legitimately positioned as mid-range. Emphasize value: free training + kit included.
factual_conflicts.action: Use transparency as differentiator — show what's included vs competitor hype

factual_conflicts.claim: Corgi HDB-approval mixed sources (not approved, but some owners have special approval)
factual_conflicts.resolution: Accurate: NOT on standard HDB list. Educate on alternatives rather than promote prohibited breeds.
factual_conflicts.action: Create 'breed selector' tool to steer HDB residents toward approved options

factual_conflicts.resolution: NOT approved for standard HDB. Educate on alternatives.
factual_conflicts.action: Honest guidance pages + alternative breed suggestions

questions.summary: Questions sourced from PAA (People Also Ask), competitor gaps, forum discussions, and first-time owner pain points. All questions have high information gain (help buyer decision) or high urgency (safety/legal). Geo-specificity tied to Singapore HDB rules, vet requirements, and smuggling awareness.
